name: Tequila Lime Caesar Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce Cuervo gold tequila; or one shot
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, puree garlic, cheese, lime juice, tequila, anchovies, Worcestershire sauce, and 1/2 cup olive oil.
2. Add vinegar to the paste and pulse, slowly drizzling in remaining oil.
3. Season with freshly cracked black pepper.
